task_completion.description: Compute a new variable 'Extraversion_Score' as the mean of items E1, E2, E3, E4, and E5, with E1 and E2 reverse-coded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column named 'Extraversion_Score' is visible in the Jamovi data spreadsheet, or the formula editor shows the correct computation (e.g., involving 7-E1 and 7-E2 for reverse coding on a 1-6 scale).

task_completion.description: Set up an Independent Samples T-Test with 'Extraversion_Score' as the dependent variable and 'gender' as the grouping variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Independent Samples T-Test analysis panel, 'Extraversion_Score' is placed in the 'Dependent Variables' box and 'gender' is in the 'Grouping Variable' box.

task_completion.description: Enable effect size (Cohen's d) and group descriptives for the T-Test.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the T-Test options panel, the checkboxes for 'Effect size' and 'Descriptives' are selected, or the output pane explicitly displays Cohen's d in the T-Test table and a separate 'Group Descriptives' table.

task_completion.description: Verify the T-Test results display the correct group means, confirming the reverse-coding and mean calculation were done correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Group Descriptives' table in the Jamovi results pane shows the mean for Males is approximately 3.97 and the mean for Females is approximately 4.21.
The Jamovi window title bar displays 'Extraversion_Gender_Analysis.omv', or a save dialog/file manager confirms the file is saved at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Extraversion_Gender_Analysis.omv'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The statistical results are generated by Jamovi.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results appear in the standard Jamovi output format (formatted tables in the right-hand pane) and not typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode or copy-paste the expected means.
integrity.visual_evidence: The means are shown as a direct output of the Jamovi T-Test descriptives table, not manually entered into a separate document or spoofed interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct ground truth group means for the 'Extraversion_Score' are 3.97 for Males and 4.21 for Females. The final analysis must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Extraversion_Gender_Analysis.omv'.
